name: nat_vent_active_indoor_in_band_guard_dormant
description: Regression guard: ceiling guard correctly dormant when nat-vent active and indoor within band

verdict.summary: When nat-vent is active and indoor is within comfort band (comfort_heat < indoor < comfort_cool), ceiling guard stays dormant
verdict.observed_behavior: nat_vent_active=True with indoor 73F within band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F
verdict.expected_behavior: ceiling guard dormant, nat_vent continues, no HVAC intervention

events.note: Morning: indoor 72.5F, outdoor 65F (favorable for nat vent)
Window opens: outdoor 65F < indoor 72.5F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor <= threshold 77F — nat vent activates

Mid-morning: indoor 73F still within comfort band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F (still favorable). Nat vent continues to provide free cooling. Ceiling guard should remain dormant — this is correct behavior.

assertions.reason: Window opens with favorable conditions: outdoor 65F < indoor 72.5F, outdoor <= threshold 77F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F — nat vent activates

REGRESSION GUARD: temp_update with nat_vent_active and indoor 73F within band [70F, 74F] — ceiling guard dormant, nat vent continues. No HVAC change. This guards against broken ceiling guard logic that incorrectly fires when nat vent is already handling cooling.
